target_category: Legal/regulatory order with contested chronology or actor responsibility
source_family: SEC — Order Instituting Cease-and-Desist Proceedings (administrative proceeding)
document_type: Settled administrative cease-and-desist order making findings; locates responsibility for misleading cybersecurity disclosures across multiple loci (disclosure controls, cybersecurity personnel, disclosure drafters) and recites a multi-year, forensically-gapped chronology
release_numbers: Securities Act Release No. 11323; Exchange Act Release No. 101401
